calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Judgement creditor Dana Doron's motion for assignment order and order restraining judgment debtor is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

James L. Hand, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Dana Doron, sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants Naturalena Brands, Inc. and Adrian Forsyth.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendants as follows:
Principal $81,857.97
Pre-Judgment Interest $9267.27
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $667.45
Total Judgment in the amount of $91,792.69

Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Stanwood, Esq. (650-362-4150) of chan & Punzalan specially appearing for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PUNZALAN LAW INC'S AND ATTY. MARK PUNZALAN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL is GRANTED. No opposition was filed and good cause is shown. The court will sign the moving party's proposed judicial council orders.

2 Orders signed. (see scanned orders for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840, mlyon@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-19-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
